content:
3️⃣ Mastery Exam Challenge (Expanded & Improved)

Students can now submit their own Mastery Exam questions via:

🔹 📢 The Complaint Box (or “Prayers to an Unhearing God”)
• Students submit challenges to “knock the professor off their high horse.”
• If their question is accepted, they gain an automatic bonus.

✅ Why This Works:
• Encourages student engagement & humor.
• Adds an interactive, rebellious edge to the challenge.

4️⃣ Final Reflection Letter (New Structure)

The Final Reflection Letter now follows the literary analysis lens (Concrete, Abstract, Connecting, Exploratory) and ties into self-identity & future planning.

🔹 Concrete: How would you define your academic strengths/weaknesses based on this course?
🔹 Abstract: How has your understanding of literature, storytelling, or critical thinking changed?
